# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deploy

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      custom_script:
        description: 'Custom script to execute'
        required: false
        type: string
      deployment_target:
        description: 'Deployment target environment'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - dev
          - staging
          - production

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    timeout-minutes: 60
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3
      
      - name: Set up environment
        run: |
          echo "Setting up build environment"
          mkdir -p build-output
          mkdir -p logs
      
      - name: Execute custom build script
        if: github.event.inputs.custom_script != ''
        run: |
          echo "Executing custom script: ${{ github.event.inputs.custom_script }}"
          ${{ github.event.inputs.custom_script }}
      
      - name: Run default build script
        if: github.event.inputs.custom_script == '' && hashFiles('.github/scripts/build.sh') != ''
        run: |
          chmod +x .github/scripts/build.sh
          .github/scripts/build.sh
      
      - name: Run developer build script
        if: hashFiles('build.sh') != ''
        run: |
          chmod +x build.sh
          ./build.sh
      
      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: build-output/
          retention-days: 7

  deploy:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    needs: build
    if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
    timeout-minutes: 30
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3
      
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: build-output/
      
      - name: Execute custom deployment
        if: github.event.inputs.deployment_target != ''
        run: |
          echo "Deploying to: ${{ github.event.inputs.deployment_target }}"
          if [ -f ".github/scripts/deploy-${{ github.event.inputs.deployment_target }}.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x .github/scripts/deploy-${{ github.event.inputs.deployment_target }}.sh
            .github/scripts/deploy-${{ github.event.inputs.deployment_target }}.sh
          fi
      
      - name: Run developer deployment script
        if: hashFiles('deploy.sh') != ''
        run: |
          chmod +x deploy.sh
          ./deploy.sh
      
      - name: Execute custom commands
        if: hashFiles('.github/scripts/custom-commands.sh') != ''
        run: |
          chmod +x .github/scripts/custom-commands.sh
          .github/scripts/custom-commands.sh

  custom-job:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    if: github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch'
    timeout-minutes: 120
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3
      
      - name: Execute any custom workflow
        run: |
          if [ -f "custom-workflow.sh" ]; then
            chmod +x custom-workflow.sh
            ./custom-workflow.sh
          else
            echo "No custom workflow found, executing default operations"
          fi
